calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-18-2007 Amended

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-21-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an Adult, and Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.
Petitioner Wenda Ye, was, present in pro per for himself, and as Guardian ad litem for and with the Minor, Shuyi Ye.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Evelyn Lew was placed under oath and served as Taishan speaking interpreter for petitioner.
Proof of Service in file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Edmond Yip.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Amy Shuyi Yip.

Decree Changing names was submitted to and signed by the Court.
